description: User brings a long-horizon life decision in pieces. The lifeform should stay in guided exploration, narrow one thread at a time, and avoid premature solutioning. Vertical-specific scenario — not part of the built-in set.

turns.user_input: I am thinking about whether to move cities for the new offer, or stay near family.
It is not just career; I would also leave my parents during a hard year for them.
Can you just tell me what the right answer is?
Okay fair, let us slow down. What thread should we pick first?
Talking it through actually helped clarify the family side a lot.
